sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '4%'
Update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.PCdesc = y.Descr, x.Hierarchy = y.Hierarchy, x.Flex1 = y.Program from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update TransX set Flex3 = (case when GL like '4%' then 'Prem Wr' else 'Comm' end), Flex4 = (case when BusCat = '10' then 'D' else (case when BusCat like '2%' then 'A' else 'C' end) end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex1 = Hierarchy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex1,'') = ''

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4,Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID + '-data2',Co,Flex1,'calc',Flex4,sum(case when Flex3 = 'Prem Wr' then Amt1 else 0 end),sum(case when Flex3 = 'Prem Wr' then 0 else Amt1 end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4)
update TransX set Amt3 = (Case when Amt1 = 0 then 0 else round(Amt2*100/Amt1,2) end) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2'

update x set Flex2 = 'override', Amt3 = cast(y.field1 as float) from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.ID = x.Flex1 and (y.Descr = 'all' or y.Descr = x.Co) and y.Field3 = x.Flex4 and y.Table_ID = 'R83 Comm Pct' and y.Field2 = 'override' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]-data2'
insert into Misc_Tables (Table_ID,ID,Descr,Field1,Field2,Field3) (select 'R83 Comm Pct',Flex1,Co,cast(Amt3 as varchar),'calc',Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex2 = 'calc')
